mapper.select: SELECT R.STRRESNAME , R.STRIPADDR , I.STRIFNAME , I.STRIFDESC , I.STRIFSPEED , I.STRIFTYPE , I.STRIFOPERSTATUS , UO.NREN_ID , UO.NREN_NAME , UO.NODE_ID , UO.IF_ID , E.INTERRIDX , E.MODULE_SRL , E.STRRESID , E.STRIFID , E.STRTYPE , E.STRLEVEL , E.STRTITLE , E.STRCONTENT , E.STRGROUPID , E.STRGROUPID1 , E.STRGROUPID2 , E.STRGROUPID3 , E.STRGROUPID4 , E.STRGROUPID5 , E.STRGROUPID6 , E.STRGROUPID7 , E.STRGROUPID8 , E.STRGROUPID9 , E.STRGROUPID10 , E.DATERAISEDATE , E.DATECLEARDATE , E.DATEREGDATE , E.STRCLEARCHECK , E.STRMEMO , E.STRACKNOWNCHECK , E.STRACKNOWNCHECK_MEMBER_SRL FROM IP_YD.XE_CVNMS_ERROR E LEFT OUTER JOIN IP_YD.XE_CVNMS_RESOURCE R ON E.STRRESID = R.STRRESID LEFT OUTER JOIN IP_YD.XE_CVNMS_RESOURCE_IF I ON E.STRRESID = I.STRRESID AND E.STRIFID = I.STRIFID LEFT OUTER JOIN RESOURCE.TB_PORT_MST PM ON PM.NODE_NUM = I.STRRESID AND PM.IF_NUM = I.STRIFID LEFT OUTER JOIN RESOURCE.TB_USER_ORGAN UO ON PM.NODE_ID = UO.NODE_ID AND PM.IF_ID = UO.IF_ID WHERE E.INTERRIDX > #{interrIdx} ORDER BY E.INTERRIDX

SELECT R.STRRESNAME , R.STRIPADDR , I.STRIFNAME , I.STRIFDESC , I.STRIFSPEED , I.STRIFTYPE , I.STRIFOPERSTATUS , UO.NREN_ID , UO.NREN_NAME , UO.NODE_ID , UO.IF_ID , P.STRIFID , P.STRRESID , P.STRTYPEMIN , P.INTTIMESTAMP , P.INTYEAR , P.INTMONTH , P.INTDAY , P.INTHOUR , P.INTMIN , P.INTWEEK , P.INTBANDWIDTH , P.FLTBPSIN , P.FLTBPSOUT , P.FLTPPSIN , P.FLTPPSOUT , P.FLTERRORIN , P.FLTERROROUT , P.FLTDISCARDIN , P.FLTDISCARDOUT , P.FLTUNKNOWN , P.FLTUSAGE , P.FLHCINOCTETS , P.FLHCOUTOCTETS , P.FLHCINUCASTPKTS , P.FLHCOUTUCASTPKTS , P.FLHCINMULTICASTPKTS , P.FLHCOUTMULTICASTPKTS , P.FLHCINBROADCASTPKTS , P.FLHCOUTBROADCASTPKTS , P.FLTBPSINMAX , P.FLTBPSOUTMAX , P.FLTPPSINMAX , P.FLTPPSOUTMAX , P.FLTERRORINMAX , P.FLTERROROUTMAX , P.FLTDISCARDINMAX , P.FLTDISCARDOUTMAX , P.FLTUNKNOWNMAX , P.FLTUSAGEMAX FROM IP_YD.XE_CVNMS_PERF_IF P LEFT OUTER JOIN IP_YD.XE_CVNMS_RESOURCE R ON P.STRRESID = R.STRRESID LEFT OUTER JOIN IP_YD.XE_CVNMS_RESOURCE_IF I ON P.STRRESID = I.STRRESID AND P.STRIFID = I.STRIFID LEFT OUTER JOIN RESOURCE.TB_PORT_MST PM ON PM.NODE_NUM = I.STRRESID AND PM.IF_NUM = I.STRIFID LEFT OUTER JOIN RESOURCE.TB_USER_ORGAN UO ON PM.NODE_ID = UO.NODE_ID AND PM.IF_ID = UO.IF_ID WHERE P.INTTIMESTAMP > #{inttimestamp} AND P.INSERT_TIME > (SELECT NOW() - INTERVAL '1 HOUR') ORDER BY P.INTTIMESTAMP

select a.agent_address as strresip , n.node_nm as strresname , a.src_ip as strsIp , a.src_port as strsPort , a.src_mac as strsMac , a.dst_ip as strdIp , a.dst_port as strdPort , a.dst_mac as strdMac , '116.89.191.47' as strsenderip , a.packet_bytes * count(1) over (partition by collect_host, agent_address, ether_type, header_protocol, input_ifindex, output_ifindex, sample_direction, src_ip, src_mac, src_port, source_id_type, source_id_index, dst_ip, dst_mac, dst_port, packet_bytes, packet_drops, frame_length, header_length, ip_dscp, ip_ecn, ip_flags, ip_fragment_offset, ip_total_length, ip_ttl, sampling_rate, tcp_header_length, tcp_urgent_pointer, tcp_window_size, collect_timestamp)as strbytes_col , count(1) over (partition by collect_host, agent_address, ether_type, header_protocol, input_ifindex, output_ifindex, sample_direction, src_ip, src_mac, src_port, source_id_type, source_id_index, dst_ip, dst_mac, dst_port, packet_bytes, packet_drops, frame_length, header_length, ip_dscp, ip_ecn, ip_flags, ip_fragment_offset, ip_total_length, ip_ttl, sampling_rate, tcp_header_length, tcp_urgent_pointer, tcp_window_size, collect_timestamp) strcounts , a.collect_timestamp as dateregdate from gather.tb_sflow_collect a inner join resource.tb_node_mst n on a.agent_address = n.ip_addr where a.collect_timestamp > #{timestamp}::timestamp

SELECT NODE_NUM , NODE_ID , NODE_NM , MODEL_NUM , MODEL_ID , IP_ADDR , MAC_ADDR , ADMIN_YN , PRIMARY_GB , SNMP_VER , SNMP_COMMUNITY , SNMP_PORT , LATITUDE , LONGITUDE , NETCONF_PORT , NETCONF_ID , NETCONF_PW , NETCONF_TYPE , NODE_DIVISION , VENDOR , SFLOW_IP , UP_DATETIME , CHNG_DATETIME , REG_DATETIME , DATA_SOURCE FROM RESOURCE.TB_NODE_MST

SELECT NODE_NUM , NODE_ID , IF_NUM , IF_ID , IF_NM , IF_INDEX , IF_DESC , IF_TYPE , IF_SPEED , IP_ADDR , MAC_ADDR , IF_OPER_STATUS , IP_PREFIX , IF_DIVISTION , CHNG_DATETIME , REG_DATETIME , DATA_SOURCE FROM RESOURCE.TB_PORT_MST

SELECT SRC_NODE_NUM , SRC_NODE_ID , SRC_IF_NUM , SRC_IF_ID , DEST_NODE_NUM , DEST_NODE_ID , DEST_IF_NUM , DEST_IF_ID , LINK_DESC , VLAN , TAG , SRC_IP_ADDR , SRC_MAC_ADDR , DEST_IP_ADDR , DEST_MAC_ADDR , PREFIX , TOPOLOGY , BANDWIDTH , LINK_TYPE , LINK_DIV , CHNG_DATETIME , REG_DATETIME , DATA_SOURCE , CIRCUIT_NUM FROM RESOURCE.TB_BACKBONE_LINK

SELECT INTRESIDX , MODULE_SRL , MEMBER_SRL , STRRESNAME , STRRESID , STRRESTYPE , STRMODELID , STRGROUPID , STRGROUPID1 , STRGROUPID2 , STRGROUPID3 , STRGROUPID4 , STRGROUPID5 , STRGROUPID6 , STRGROUPID7 , STRGROUPID8 , STRGROUPID9 , STRGROUPID10 , STRTAGS , STRPRIORITY , STRRESMEMO , STRCOLID , STRIPVER , STRIPADDR , STRIPV6ADDR , STRSNMPIPADDR , STRSNMPVER , STRSNMPCOMMUNITY , INTSNMPPORT , INTSNMPTIMEOUT , STRSNMPV3_USERNAME , STRSNMPV3_SECURITYLEVEL , STRSNMPV3_AUTHENTICATIONPROTOCOL , STRSNMPV3_AUTHENTICATIONPASSWORD , STRSNMPV3_PRIVACYPROTOCOL , STRSNMPV3_PRIVACYPASSWORD , STRSNMPV3_CONTEXTNAME , STRENABLED_CPU , STRENABLED_MEM , STRENABLED_DISK , STRSNMPMIB_CPU , STRSNMPMIB_MEM , STRSNMPMIB_DISK , STREVENT_CPU , STREVENT_MEM , STREVENT_DISK , STRSTATUSSNMP , STRENABLEDSNMP , DATEUPTIME , STRSTATUSPING , INTINTERVALPING , INTTIMEOUTPING , STRENABLEDPING , INTLOGRAISECOUNT , INTERRRAISECOUNT , STRCPUCURRENT , STRMEMCURRENT , STRDISKCURRENT , STRRTTCURRENT , INTSENSORPID , STRALIVE , STRCONTACTS , DATEPROBEUPDATEDATE , DATELASTUPDATEDATE , DATEREGDATE FROM IP_YD.XE_CVNMS_RESOURCE

SELECT INTIFIDX , MODULE_SRL , STRRESID , STRIFID , STRIFNAME , STRRESID_A , STRRESID_Z , INTIFINDEX , STRIFDESC , STRIFTYPE , STRIFSPEED , STRIFPHYSADDRESS , STRIFOPERSTATUS , STRIFLIMITBPS , STRIFLIMITBPSC , STRIFLIMITBPSM , STRIFLIMITBPSN , STRIFLIMITBPSW , STRIFERRLEVEL , STRIFIPADDR , STRIFMANPERF , STRIFMANERROR , STRIFCURRENT , STRIFLIMITERR , STRIFMEMO , DATELASTUPDATEDATE , DATEREGDATE FROM IP_YD.XE_CVNMS_RESOURCE_IF

SELECT TNT.STRRESNUM, TNT.STRRESIP, TNT.STRRESNAME, TNT.STRS_IP, TNT.STRS_PORT, TNT.STRD_IP, TNT.STRD_PORT, TNT.STRS_MAC, TNT.STRD_MAC, TNT.STRPROTOCOL, TNT.STRIPV4TOS, TNT.STRCHANNEL, TNT.STRSENDERIP, TNT.STRIN_INTERFACE, TNT.STROUT_INTERFACE, TNT.STRBYTES_COL, TNT.STRCOUNTS, TNT.DATEREGDATE, TS.AI_ACCURACY FROM RCA.TB_NOXIOUS_TRAFFIC TNT LEFT OUTER JOIN NIA.TB_SOP TS ON TNT.TICKET_ID = TS.TICKET_ID WHERE TNT.DATEREGDATE >= current_date - interval '1 day' AND DATEREGDATE < current_date

SELECT TNT.TICKET_ID, STRRESNUM, STRRESIP, STRRESNAME, STRS_IP, STRS_PORT, STRD_IP, STRD_PORT, STRS_MAC, STRD_MAC, STRPROTOCOL, STRIPV4TOS, STRCHANNEL, STRSENDERIP, STRIN_INTERFACE, STROUT_INTERFACE, STRBYTES_COL, STRCOUNTS, DATEREGDATE, TS.AI_ACCURACY FROM RCA.TB_NOXIOUS_TRAFFIC TNT LEFT OUTER JOIN NIA.TB_SOP TS ON TNT.TICKET_ID = TS.TICKET_ID WHERE TS.AI_ACCURACY IS NOT null

SELECT STRRESNM , STRIPADDR , STRIFNAME , STRIFDESC , STRIFSPEED , STRIFTYPE , STRIFOPERSTATUS , NREN_ID , NREN_NAME , NODE_ID , IF_ID , T.STRIFID , T.STRRESID , STRTYPEMIN , INTTIMESTAMP , INTYEAR , INTMONTH , INTDAY , INTHOUR , INTMIN , INTWEEK , INTBANDWIDTH , FLTBPSIN , FLTBPSOUT , FLTPPSIN , FLTPPSOUT , FLTERRORIN , FLTERROROUT , FLTDISCARDIN , FLTDISCARDOUT , FLTUNKNOWN , FLTUSAGE , FLHCINOCTETS , FLHCOUTOCTETS , FLHCINUCASTPKTS , FLHCOUTUCASTPKTS , FLHCINMULTICASTPKTS , FLHCOUTMULTICASTPKTS , FLHCINBROADCASTPKTS , FLHCOUTBROADCASTPKTS , FLTBPSINMAX , FLTBPSOUTMAX , FLTPPSINMAX , FLTPPSOUTMAX , FLTERRORINMAX , FLTERROROUTMAX , FLTDISCARDINMAX , FLTDISCARDOUTMAX , FLTUNKNOWNMAX , FLTUSAGEMAX , AI.AI_ACCURACY , T.MEASURED_DATETIME FROM (SELECT NM.NODE_NM AS STRRESNM , NULL AS STRIPADDR , PM.IF_NM AS STRIFNAME , PM.IF_DESC AS STRIFDESC , PM.IF_SPEED AS STRIFSPEED , PM.IF_TYPE AS STRIFTYPE , PM.IF_OPER_STATUS AS STRIFOPERSTATUS , UO.NREN_ID , UO.NREN_NAME , UO.NODE_ID , UO.IF_ID , PM.IF_NUM AS STRIFID , PM.NODE_NUM AS STRRESID , '1' AS STRTYPEMIN , EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM LT.MEASURED_DATETIME) - 32400 AS INTTIMESTAMP , DATE_PART('YEAR'::TEXT, LT.MEASURED_DATETIME)::INTEGER AS INTYEAR , DATE_PART('MONTH'::TEXT, LT.MEASURED_DATETIME)::INTEGER AS INTMONTH, DATE_PART('DAY'::TEXT, LT.MEASURED_DATETIME)::INTEGER AS INTDAY, DATE_PART('HOUR'::TEXT, LT.MEASURED_DATETIME)::INTEGER AS INTHOUR , DATE_PART('MINUTE'::TEXT, LT.MEASURED_DATETIME)::INTEGER AS INTMIN, EXTRACT(ISODOW FROM LT.MEASURED_DATETIME) AS INTWEEK , 0 AS INTBANDWIDTH , LT.RX_BIT_RATE AS FLTBPSIN , LT.TX_BIT_RATE AS FLTBPSOUT , LT.RX_PKT_RATE AS FLTPPSIN , LT.TX_PKT_RATE AS FLTPPSOUT , 0 AS FLTERRORIN , 0 AS FLTERROROUT , 0 AS FLTDISCARDIN , 0 AS FLTDISCARDOUT , 0 AS FLTUNKNOWN , 0 AS FLTUSAGE , 0 AS FLHCINOCTETS , 0 AS FLHCOUTOCTETS , 0 AS FLHCINUCASTPKTS , 0 AS FLHCOUTUCASTPKTS , 0 AS FLHCINMULTICASTPKTS , 0 AS FLHCOUTMULTICASTPKTS , 0 AS FLHCINBROADCASTPKTS , 0 AS FLHCOUTBROADCASTPKTS , 0 AS FLTBPSINMAX , 0 AS FLTBPSOUTMAX , 0 AS FLTPPSINMAX , 0 AS FLTPPSOUTMAX , 0 AS FLTERRORINMAX , 0 AS FLTERROROUTMAX , 0 AS FLTDISCARDINMAX , 0 AS FLTDISCARDOUTMAX , 0 AS FLTUNKNOWNMAX , 0 AS FLTUSAGEMAX , LT.MEASURED_DATETIME FROM IP_SDN.TB_LINK_TRAFFIC LT INNER JOIN IP_SDN.TB_INTERFACE I ON LT.IF_ID = I.ID INNER JOIN RESOURCE.TB_PORT_MST PM ON PM.IF_ID = LOWER(I.IF_NAME) INNER JOIN IP_SDN.TB_NODE N ON I.NODE_ID = N.ID INNER JOIN RESOURCE.TB_NODE_MST NM ON N.ID = NM.IP_SDN_ID::INT LEFT OUTER JOIN RESOURCE.TB_USER_ORGAN UO ON UO.NODE_ID = NM.NODE_ID AND UO.IF_ID = PM.IF_ID WHERE LT.MEASURED_DATETIME BETWEEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '1 day' AND CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) T LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT A1T.STRIFID, A1T.STRRESID, A1T.MEASURED_DATETIME, TS.AI_ACCURACY FROM RCA.TB_ANOMALOUS_1MI_TRAFFIC A1T INNER JOIN NIA.TB_SOP TS ON A1T.TICKET_ID = TS.TICKET_ID) AI ON T.STRIFID = AI.STRIFID AND T.STRRESID = AI.STRRESID AND T.MEASURED_DATETIME = AI.MEASURED_DATETIME -- WHERE AI.AI_ACCURACY IS NOT NULL

SELECT AI.TICKET_ID , AI.TICKET_TYPE , STRRESNM , STRIPADDR , STRIFNAME , STRIFDESC , STRIFSPEED , STRIFTYPE , STRIFOPERSTATUS , NREN_ID , NREN_NAME , NODE_ID , IF_ID , T.STRIFID , T.STRRESID , STRTYPEMIN , INTTIMESTAMP , INTYEAR , INTMONTH , INTDAY , INTHOUR , INTMIN , INTWEEK , INTBANDWIDTH , FLTBPSIN , FLTBPSOUT , FLTPPSIN , FLTPPSOUT , FLTERRORIN , FLTERROROUT , FLTDISCARDIN , FLTDISCARDOUT , FLTUNKNOWN , FLTUSAGE , FLHCINOCTETS , FLHCOUTOCTETS , FLHCINUCASTPKTS , FLHCOUTUCASTPKTS , FLHCINMULTICASTPKTS , FLHCOUTMULTICASTPKTS , FLHCINBROADCASTPKTS , FLHCOUTBROADCASTPKTS , FLTBPSINMAX , FLTBPSOUTMAX , FLTPPSINMAX , FLTPPSOUTMAX , FLTERRORINMAX , FLTERROROUTMAX , FLTDISCARDINMAX , FLTDISCARDOUTMAX , FLTUNKNOWNMAX , FLTUSAGEMAX , AI.AI_ACCURACY , T.MEASURED_DATETIME FROM (SELECT NM.NODE_NM AS STRRESNM , NULL AS STRIPADDR , PM.IF_NM AS STRIFNAME , PM.IF_DESC AS STRIFDESC , PM.IF_SPEED AS STRIFSPEED , PM.IF_TYPE AS STRIFTYPE , PM.IF_OPER_STATUS AS STRIFOPERSTATUS , UO.NREN_ID , UO.NREN_NAME , UO.NODE_ID , UO.IF_ID , PM.IF_NUM AS STRIFID , PM.NODE_NUM AS STRRESID , '1' AS STRTYPEMIN , EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM LT.MEASURED_DATETIME) - 32400 AS INTTIMESTAMP , DATE_PART('YEAR'::TEXT, LT.MEASURED_DATETIME)::INTEGER AS INTYEAR , DATE_PART('MONTH'::TEXT, LT.MEASURED_DATETIME)::INTEGER AS INTMONTH, DATE_PART('DAY'::TEXT, LT.MEASURED_DATETIME)::INTEGER AS INTDAY, DATE_PART('HOUR'::TEXT, LT.MEASURED_DATETIME)::INTEGER AS INTHOUR , DATE_PART('MINUTE'::TEXT, LT.MEASURED_DATETIME)::INTEGER AS INTMIN, EXTRACT(ISODOW FROM LT.MEASURED_DATETIME) AS INTWEEK , 0 AS INTBANDWIDTH , LT.RX_BIT_RATE AS FLTBPSIN , LT.TX_BIT_RATE AS FLTBPSOUT , LT.RX_PKT_RATE AS FLTPPSIN , LT.TX_PKT_RATE AS FLTPPSOUT , 0 AS FLTERRORIN , 0 AS FLTERROROUT , 0 AS FLTDISCARDIN , 0 AS FLTDISCARDOUT , 0 AS FLTUNKNOWN , 0 AS FLTUSAGE , 0 AS FLHCINOCTETS , 0 AS FLHCOUTOCTETS , 0 AS FLHCINUCASTPKTS , 0 AS FLHCOUTUCASTPKTS , 0 AS FLHCINMULTICASTPKTS , 0 AS FLHCOUTMULTICASTPKTS , 0 AS FLHCINBROADCASTPKTS , 0 AS FLHCOUTBROADCASTPKTS , 0 AS FLTBPSINMAX , 0 AS FLTBPSOUTMAX , 0 AS FLTPPSINMAX , 0 AS FLTPPSOUTMAX , 0 AS FLTERRORINMAX , 0 AS FLTERROROUTMAX , 0 AS FLTDISCARDINMAX , 0 AS FLTDISCARDOUTMAX , 0 AS FLTUNKNOWNMAX , 0 AS FLTUSAGEMAX , LT.MEASURED_DATETIME FROM IP_SDN.TB_LINK_TRAFFIC LT INNER JOIN IP_SDN.TB_INTERFACE I ON LT.IF_ID = I.ID INNER JOIN RESOURCE.TB_PORT_MST PM ON PM.IF_ID = LOWER(I.IF_NAME) INNER JOIN IP_SDN.TB_NODE N ON I.NODE_ID = N.ID INNER JOIN RESOURCE.TB_NODE_MST NM ON N.ID = NM.IP_SDN_ID::INT LEFT OUTER JOIN RESOURCE.TB_USER_ORGAN UO ON UO.NODE_ID = NM.NODE_ID AND UO.IF_ID = PM.IF_ID WHERE LT.MEASURED_DATETIME BETWEEN '2023-07-01 00:00:00.000' AND NOW()) T LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT A1T.STRIFID, A1T.STRRESID, A1T.MEASURED_DATETIME, TS.AI_ACCURACY, TS.TICKET_ID, TS.TICKET_TYPE FROM RCA.TB_ANOMALOUS_1MI_TRAFFIC A1T INNER JOIN NIA.TB_SOP TS ON A1T.TICKET_ID = TS.TICKET_ID) AI ON T.STRIFID = AI.STRIFID AND T.STRRESID = AI.STRRESID AND T.MEASURED_DATETIME = AI.MEASURED_DATETIME where AI.AI_ACCURACY is NOT null

select f.strifid, f.strifnm, f.strresid, f.strresnm, f.strtypemin, f.inttimestamp, f.intyear, f.intmonth, f.intday, f.inthour, f.intmin, f.intweek, f.intbandwidth, f.fltbpsin, f.fltbpsout, f.fltppsin, f.fltppsout, f.flterrorin, f.flterrorout, f.fltdiscardin, f.fltdiscardout, f.fltunknown, f.fltusage, f.flhcinoctets, f.flhcoutoctets, f.flhcinucastpkts, f.flhcoutucastpkts, f.flhcinmulticastpkts, f.flhcoutmulticastpkts, f.flhcinbroadcastpkts, f.flhcoutbroadcastpkts, f.fltbpsinmax, f.fltbpsoutmax, f.fltppsinmax, f.fltppsoutmax, f.flterrorinmax, f.flterroroutmax, f.fltdiscardinmax, f.fltdiscardoutmax, f.fltunknownmax, f.fltusagemax, f.fltbpsin_anomaly, f.fltbpsout_anomaly, s.request_time, s.ai_accuracy from rca.tb_anomalous_traffic f left outer join nia.tb_sop s on f.ticket_id = s.ticket_id WHERE S.AI_ACCURACY IS NOT null

SELECT AI.TICKET_ID , AI.TICKET_TYPE , STRRESNM , STRIPADDR , STRIFNAME , STRIFDESC , STRIFSPEED , STRIFTYPE , STRIFOPERSTATUS , NREN_ID , NREN_NAME , NODE_ID , IF_ID , T.STRIFID , T.STRRESID , STRTYPEMIN , INTTIMESTAMP , INTYEAR , INTMONTH , INTDAY , INTHOUR , INTMIN , INTWEEK , INTBANDWIDTH , FLTBPSIN , FLTBPSOUT , FLTPPSIN , FLTPPSOUT , FLTERRORIN , FLTERROROUT , FLTDISCARDIN , FLTDISCARDOUT , FLTUNKNOWN , FLTUSAGE , FLHCINOCTETS , FLHCOUTOCTETS , FLHCINUCASTPKTS , FLHCOUTUCASTPKTS , FLHCINMULTICASTPKTS , FLHCOUTMULTICASTPKTS , FLHCINBROADCASTPKTS , FLHCOUTBROADCASTPKTS , FLTBPSINMAX , FLTBPSOUTMAX , FLTPPSINMAX , FLTPPSOUTMAX , FLTERRORINMAX , FLTERROROUTMAX , FLTDISCARDINMAX , FLTDISCARDOUTMAX , FLTUNKNOWNMAX , FLTUSAGEMAX , AI.AI_ACCURACY , T.MEASURED_DATETIME FROM (SELECT NM.NODE_NM AS STRRESNM , NULL AS STRIPADDR , PM.IF_NM AS STRIFNAME , PM.IF_DESC AS STRIFDESC , PM.IF_SPEED AS STRIFSPEED , PM.IF_TYPE AS STRIFTYPE , PM.IF_OPER_STATUS AS STRIFOPERSTATUS , UO.NREN_ID , UO.NREN_NAME , UO.NODE_ID , UO.IF_ID , PM.IF_NUM AS STRIFID , NM.NODE_NUM AS STRRESID , '1' AS STRTYPEMIN , EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM LT.MEASURED_DATETIME) - 32400 AS INTTIMESTAMP , DATE_PART('YEAR'::TEXT, LT.MEASURED_DATETIME)::INTEGER AS INTYEAR , DATE_PART('MONTH'::TEXT, LT.MEASURED_DATETIME)::INTEGER AS INTMONTH, DATE_PART('DAY'::TEXT, LT.MEASURED_DATETIME)::INTEGER AS INTDAY, DATE_PART('HOUR'::TEXT, LT.MEASURED_DATETIME)::INTEGER AS INTHOUR , DATE_PART('MINUTE'::TEXT, LT.MEASURED_DATETIME)::INTEGER AS INTMIN, EXTRACT(ISODOW FROM LT.MEASURED_DATETIME) AS INTWEEK , 0 AS INTBANDWIDTH , LT.RX_BIT_RATE AS FLTBPSIN , LT.TX_BIT_RATE AS FLTBPSOUT , LT.RX_PKT_RATE AS FLTPPSIN , LT.TX_PKT_RATE AS FLTPPSOUT , 0 AS FLTERRORIN , 0 AS FLTERROROUT , 0 AS FLTDISCARDIN , 0 AS FLTDISCARDOUT , 0 AS FLTUNKNOWN , 0 AS FLTUSAGE , 0 AS FLHCINOCTETS , 0 AS FLHCOUTOCTETS , 0 AS FLHCINUCASTPKTS , 0 AS FLHCOUTUCASTPKTS , 0 AS FLHCINMULTICASTPKTS , 0 AS FLHCOUTMULTICASTPKTS , 0 AS FLHCINBROADCASTPKTS , 0 AS FLHCOUTBROADCASTPKTS , 0 AS FLTBPSINMAX , 0 AS FLTBPSOUTMAX , 0 AS FLTPPSINMAX , 0 AS FLTPPSOUTMAX , 0 AS FLTERRORINMAX , 0 AS FLTERROROUTMAX , 0 AS FLTDISCARDINMAX , 0 AS FLTDISCARDOUTMAX , 0 AS FLTUNKNOWNMAX , 0 AS FLTUSAGEMAX , LT.MEASURED_DATETIME FROM IP_SDN.TB_LINK_TRAFFIC LT INNER JOIN IP_SDN.TB_INTERFACE I ON I.ID = LT.IF_ID INNER JOIN IP_SDN.TB_NODE N ON N.ID = i.id INNER JOIN RESOURCE.tb_port_mst_20220620_backup PM ON PM.IF_ID = LOWER(I.IF_NAME) and PM.node_id = LOWER(N.node_name) INNER JOIN RESOURCE.TB_NODE_MST NM ON NM.IP_SDN_ID::INT = N.ID LEFT OUTER JOIN RESOURCE.TB_USER_ORGAN UO ON UO.NODE_ID = NM.NODE_ID AND UO.IF_ID = PM.IF_ID WHERE LT.MEASURED_DATETIME BETWEEN '2024-04-01 00:00:00.000' AND now()) T LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT A1T.STRIFID, A1T.STRRESID, A1T.MEASURED_DATETIME, TS.AI_ACCURACY, TS.TICKET_ID, TS.TICKET_TYPE FROM RCA.TB_ANOMALOUS_1MI_TRAFFIC A1T INNER JOIN NIA.TB_SOP TS ON A1T.TICKET_ID = TS.TICKET_ID) AI ON T.STRIFID = AI.STRIFID AND T.STRRESID = AI.STRRESID AND T.MEASURED_DATETIME = AI.MEASURED_DATETIME where AI.AI_ACCURACY is NOT null

SELECT sop_id, ticket_id, ticket_type, ticket_result, status, request_time, receive_time, detail, fault_classify, fault_type, fault_detail_content, etc_content, ai_accuracy, fault_type_content, start_time, end_time, handling_ack_user, handling_ack_time, handling_fin_user, handling_fin_time, autoproc_type, zero1_model, zero1_entropy FROM nia.tb_sop WHERE request_time >= current_date - interval '1 day' + interval '1 hour' -- 전날의 1시부터 AND request_time < current_date + interval '1 hour'; -- 오늘의 1시 이전까지
